prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次分别为12135→10741→9823→12204→9130，整体呈波动走势，2025年位次9130为近5年最优（数字最小），较2024年大幅前移 约3074名，波动幅度较大；该校在河南省物理类招生计划：2021年144人、2022年148人、2023年152人、2024年152人、2025年156人，逐年小幅递增；2026年（§ 7）计划大幅扩至206人，较2025年增加50人（+32%），扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局产生重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排 名2026年第36名，近年稳定在33–38名区间，属顶尖211层次；近年声誉评价为中性/混合，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度排名第65（一般），综合热度约47.2万 ，短视频曝光量处于中等水平，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；历史无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估：化学工程与技术A+、光学工程A-、控制科学与工程A- 、机械工程A-，兵器科学与技术为传统王牌，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势学科高 度契合；河南省2026年普通高考总考生约120万人（数据标注不确定），较2025年物理类55.5万大幅增加，竞争加剧；该校位于 江苏南京，属长三角发达地区，对河南考生有较强地域吸引力；本校在河南招生占比近年约4.5%–7%，2025年物理类156人占全国总招生比例约6.6%，属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次9130为近年最优基准、2026年大幅扩招50人（+32%）使竞争加剧、河南考生总数显著增加等多重因素；考虑扩招幅度较大但 考生基数同步增长，预计2026年物理类最低位次约10936名，区间10436–11436名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 12135 → 10741 → 9823 → 12204 → 9130, showing a fluctuating trend. The 2025 ranking of 9130 is the best in the past 5 years (smallest number), moving forward significantly by about 3074 places compared to 2024, with large fluctuations. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Henan Province: 144 in 2021, 148 in 2022, 152 in 2023, 152 in 2024, 156 in 2025, increasing slightly year by year. In 2026 (§ 7), the plan expands significantly to 206, an increase of 50 (+32%) compared to 2025, a notable expansion that will have an important impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 36th, and has been stable in the 33–38 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. Recent reputation evaluations are neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 65th (average), with comprehensive popularity of about 472,000, and short video exposure is at a medium level, with no abnormal increase in application attention. There is no history of admission gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation: Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Optical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, with Armament Science and Technology as the traditional trump card, highlighting strong engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (data marked as uncertain), a significant increase from the 555,000 Physics Category takers in 2025, intensifying competition. The university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a developed region in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal to Henan students. The proportion of enrollment from Henan in recent years is about 4.5%–7%, with 156 Physics Category students in 2025 accounting for about 6.6% of total national enrollment, at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 ranking of 9130 as the best baseline in recent years, the significant expansion of 50 students (+32%) in 2026 intensifying competition, and the notable increase in the total number of Henan examinees, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 10936, with a range of 10436–11436.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 10936, range 10436–11436. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within the upper limit of the range (10436) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 10900) should take Tier 2 majors like Armament Science and Technology, Automation, and Mechanical Engineering as main choices, while also aiming for Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the lower limit (11436) should take Tier 3 majors like Materials Science and Engineering, Chemical Engineering and Pharmaceutical Engineering as safety options, while also striving for Tier 2 majors. NJUST has outstanding engineering strength, and majors corresponding to advantageous disciplines such as Chemical Engineering and Technology A+ and Control Science and Engineering A- are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2025, the minimum ranking for the History Category is approximately 3645 (only one year of data available; from 2021 to 2024, Henan used the Liberal Arts model, with different subject categories that are not directly comparable). The university's enrollment plan for the History Category in Henan Province: 11 students in 2025; 10 students planned for 2026, a decrease of 1 student (-9%) compared to 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked 36th in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities; reputation evaluation is neutral; Douyin popularity is average; no record of admission cut-off gaps; Nanjing University of Science and Technology is primarily engineering-oriented, and the History Category majors (Marxist Theory, Linguistics, English, Law) have low relevance to the university's advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a relatively high social popularity (differentiated and wait-and-see), while language majors have average popularity; in 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Henan Province is approximately 1.2 million, and the number of History Category examinees is expected to grow synchronously, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline of 3645, a slight enrollment reduction of 1 student (-9%) in 2026, and an increase in the total number of examinees in Henan, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 will be approximately 3416, with a range of 2916 to 3916.
